analysis.consistency: The data is internally consistent. The structure adheres to standard D&D 5e spell formatting (level, school, casting time, components, duration, effects, classes).
analysis.quality: The quality is high. The description is detailed, covering shape manipulation, support requirements, damage mechanics (AC/HP based on thickness), and permanence conditional on concentration duration.

mechanics.primary_effect: Creates a solid, contiguous wall of stone composed of 10 panels of specified dimensions (6in thick/10x10ft or 3in thick/10x20ft).
mechanics.interaction: Can push creatures if it appears in their space; creatures completely enclosed can attempt a Dexterity save to move out using their reaction.
mechanics.constraints: Must merge with and be supported by existing stone. If spans exceed 20ft, panel size must be halved (implying thinner supports).
mechanics.durability: The wall is destructible (AC 15, 30 HP per inch of thickness).
mechanics.permanency_condition: If concentration is maintained for the full 10 minutes, the wall becomes permanent and cannot be dispelled.

analysis.notes: The mechanic for thickness scaling (30 HP per inch) is clear, making the 6-inch thick panels significantly tougher (180 HP) than the 3-inch thick panels (90 HP) for the same area.
